key_findings.significance_correction: After p-value correction, 8.3% of enhancers show significant grammar sensitivity (vs. 100% in v1 with uncorrected F-test)
key_findings.variance_source: GSI variance is dominated by DATASET (eta2=0.290), not model choice (eta2=0.045)
key_findings.v1_v2_gsi_shift: v2 mean GSI is 11.5x higher than v1 (v1=0.0729, v2=0.8356), likely due to dataset-specific probes and larger sample
